subcodes.first_line: O dearly beloved friend! Though outwardly there hath been neither association, nor message, nor distant acquaintance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست عزیز غیابی من هر چند بظاهر نه موانستی و نه پیامی و نه غائبانه آشنائی
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @war and peace, @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
